location: Lying on the ground directly in front of a stone coffin inside a small mausoleum/gazebo, due north of the Scorched Ruins Site of Grace in Gravesite Plain. It's a free pickup — no fight is required to grab it, though a group of Inquisitor enemies patrols the surrounding graveyard.
region: Gravesite Plain (Realm of Shadow, Shadow of the Erdtree DLC)

source.name: ground pickup near a Mausoleum coffin, Gravesite Plain

tactics: From Scorched Ruins grace, head almost due north across the open graveyard toward a small mausoleum/gazebo visible in the distance
The blade sits on the ground right in front of the coffin — you can walk in, grab it, and leave without fighting anything
Inquisitor enemies (spear-wielding cultist group enemies) roam this area and can gang up if you linger or get spotted

Don't confuse this with the two other Backhand Blade-type weapons (Curseblade's Cirque, Smithscript Cirque) found elsewhere — this is the base/starter version, the only one requiring just STR 10 / DEX 13
lore: A backhand-gripped curved blade the Hornsent have carried for generations; its associated fighting style favors spinning slashes and gouging thrusts rather than conventional swordplay.

builds.name: Pure Dexterity
builds.why: Its Dexterity scaling improves dramatically with a Keen affinity at higher upgrade levels, making it one of the harder-hitting pure-DEX backhand blades; pairs naturally with the innate Blind Spot skill's side-stepping gap closer.

builds.name: Quality (STR/DEX)
builds.why: Base scaling leans DEX-heavy but keeps meaningful STR scaling too, so a split quality investment isn't wasted if you want a fast off-hand option alongside a heavier main-hand weapon.
